validationLabRecommendation: Pause active VL extraction work; maintain monitoring harness for Gorgonzola + Farina
oneLineSummary: Structural extraction families are closed; true residual extraction error is ~€1–2 avg on focus rows with Gorgonzola variance and intermittent Farina €1 digit drift; Pomodor is GT not extraction.

1_deterministicBugsRemain.detail: Farina Valor digit drift (€1 when wrong; v31 3/5 correct, avg €0.40). Rulo Bocconcino €0.54 single-run. No stable multi-euro deterministic bugs remain after Rulo/Mortadella fixes.

2_gtIssuesRemain.detail: POMODOR PELATI: GT qty 2 / €50 vs visible qty 1 / €22.05. Extraction matches visible 10/10. Revise GT catalog.

3_varianceRemains.detail: Gorgonzola 60% correct v30 (10-run), avg €5.49 when wrong, worst €32.26. Prosciutto €1.4 intermittent. Bresaola/SanPellegrino stable 100%.

4_farinaStillWorthFixing.detail: v31 prompt improved 0/10→3/5 (€1.00→€0.40 avg). Further prompt-only iteration shows diminishing returns. Binder guard (unit_price > total when qty=1) may be higher ROI than v32 prompt.

5_anotherPromptIteration.answer: Unlikely to materially improve headline metrics
5_anotherPromptIteration.detail: v28→v30 fixed structural families (€8.36 focus recovery). Remaining errors are GPT variance (Gorgonzola) and digit OCR (Farina) — prompt saturation reached. v31 Farina example recovered 60% not 100%.

6_expectedROI_v32.detail: Best case: Farina to 5/5 (€0.60 avg recovery). Gorgonzola unlikely to close via prompt alone. No new structural €10+ bugs identified. Engineering time better spent on Marginly roadmap + GT catalog hygiene.

structuralBugsClosed.evidence: Geometry, IVA bleed, Mortadella, Rulo, Emporio cluster, April harness

discountFamilyClosed.evidence: Rulo/Mortadella fixed; Farina digit drift intermittent at v31

rereadSafetyClosed.evidence: Frontend guard validated; DELETE-before-INSERT race fixed

packUnitInterpretationAcceptable.evidence: 21 Class D rows; documented pack metadata vs qty

validationLabSufficientForRoadmap.evidence: 6 invoices audited; 2 CLOSED, 4 PARTIAL; no phantom rows; 96.8% financial accuracy headline

v28.note: Best single-run Class A before targeted fixes

v30.note: Rulo+Mortadella fixed; headline inflated by Pomodor GT + Gorgonzola bad run

justification: All identified structural failure families have validated fixes deployed (v28–v31)
True extraction Class A reduced from €9.36 (v28) to ~€1.54 single-run / €0.40 Farina avg (v31)
Largest headline residual (Pomodor €27.95) is GT catalog error with 10/10 visible match
Gorgonzola variance (60% stable) is acceptable GPT noise, not pipeline regression
Re-read safety and geometry risks closed with frontend + crop fixes
Further prompt iteration shows diminishing returns (v31: 60% not 100% on Farina)
risksIfClosed: Gorgonzola occasional €32 outlier on Emporio re-extract
Farina €1 digit drift on ~40% of Mammafiore runs (v31)
GT catalog not revised — VL metrics overstate extraction error until Pomodor GT fixed
recommendedNextActions: Revise Pomodor GT in field-accuracy-audit catalog (Class C hygiene)
Keep 5-run stability harness for Gorgonzola + Farina on future prompt changes
Defer v32 unless production telemetry shows Farina €1 affecting real users
